stockMarket.summary: Global markets show mixed activity. Indian indices (Sensex, Nifty) faced a significant decline (~2%) due to geopolitical tensions and profit booking. US markets show signs of recovery, with S&P 500 up 0.7% on optimism.
notableMoves: Booking Holdings (BKNG) completed a 25-for-1 forward stock split.
Ola Electric surged ~8% following price cuts.

exhibitions: Matisse's Jazz: Rhythms in Color (Art Institute of Chicago)
